headline: Senior Research Fellow & Lecturer II at Nsukka National University | Cassava Biofortification | Smallholder Farmer Engagement
summary: Crop scientist focused on vitamin-A biofortified cassava and smallholder farmer engagement in South-East Nigeria. Lead PI on a WAADA-funded cassava biofortification trial and co-PI on the WAITA-EACRI yam improvement programme. I teach undergraduate Crop Science and supervise postgraduate research at NNU.
